# Direct Marketing Code of Practice

Jurisdiction: United Kingdom
Region: UK
Citation: Direct marketing code of practice
Authority: UK Information Commissioner's Office
Source URL: https://ico.org.uk/for-organisations/direct-marketing-and-privacy-and-electronic-communications/direct-marketing-code-guidance-and-resources/
Topics: marketing_opt_out, consent, notice_transparency, profiling
Keywords: direct marketing code, PECR, marketing consent, profiling

## Summary
ICO code and guidance on direct marketing under UK GDPR and PECR.

## Key compliance obligations
- Identify lawful basis and PECR consent rules before marketing.
- Honor unsubscribe and objection rights.
- Assess profiling and enrichment used for marketing.
